message:
Add fetchPTHealthStatesCmd and wire up health state refresh

- Add fetchPTHealthStatesCmd to commands.go for fetching process_triage states
- Wire up health state fetching in Init() and fullRefresh()
- This completes the integration of pt.HealthMonitor with the dashboard

Part of bd-396n1: process_triage dashboard health indicators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
